case_title: WILTON MARSHALL et al VS. PHILLIP HALVERON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, WILTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF WILTON MARSHALL. CO-PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, WILTON MARSHALL, WILLIE MAE AS TO DEFENDANT HALVERON, PHILLIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, WILTON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HALVERON, PHILLIP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, WILTON MARSHALL, WILLIE MAE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HALVERON, PHILLIP THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY PRESENTED WERE NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH OVERBILLING BY THE ATTORNRY OR THAT THE ATTORNEY'S WORK WAS NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
